children.name: You may ask--So what’s the plan??
children.characters: You may ask--So what’s the plan??

children.name: CELEBRATING THE COMPLETION OF 2 DECADES IN THIS MORTAL WORLD
children.characters: CELEBRATING THE COMPLETION OF 2 DECADES IN THIS MORTAL WORLD

children.name: AND IT’S INCOMPLETE WITHOUT YOU, because honestly, I am entirely made of the pieces, memories, and parts shared with you.
children.characters: AND IT’S INCOMPLETE WITHOUT YOU, because honestly, I am entirely made of the pieces, memories, and parts shared with you.

children.name: JOIN ME FOR A DAY OUT, WHERE WE TRY DESSERTS, VISIT A GOOD LUNCH PLACE AND GRAB SNACKS ON MY LIST FROM STORE FOR EVENING PLAN--A SNACK HAUL.
children.characters: JOIN ME FOR A DAY OUT, WHERE WE TRY DESSERTS, VISIT A GOOD LUNCH PLACE AND GRAB SNACKS ON MY LIST FROM  STORE FOR EVENING PLAN--A SNACK HAUL.

children.name: CALCULATED EXPENSE OF DAY OUT: 500/- PER PERSON
children.characters: CALCULATED EXPENSE OF DAY OUT: 500/- PER PERSON

children.name: It’s my birthday, so you already know we have to do it big. Grab the prettiest, most scandalous dress in your closet and meet me at my place at 6:30 PM sharp! We are doing it all: fun games, an actual photoshoot, tons of food, a massive snack haul, and obviously a lot of dancing. P.S. If you want to get me a gift, I actually made a list of stuff I want! 🔗 VIEW MY GIFT REGISTRY HERE
children.characters:
It’s my birthday, so you already know we have to do it big. Grab the prettiest, most scandalous dress in your closet and meet me at my place at 6:30 PM sharp!
We are doing it all: fun games, an actual photoshoot, tons of food, a massive snack haul, and obviously a lot of dancing.
P.S. If you want to get me a gift, I actually made a list of stuff I want! 🔗 VIEW MY GIFT REGISTRY HERE

children.name: ⚠️ BUT THERE’S A CATCH... Your entry ticket into the party is a snack that matches the exact color of ANYTHING you are wearing. No matching snack, no entry. Choose your outfit (and your cravings) wisely.
children.characters: ⚠️ BUT THERE’S A CATCH... Your entry ticket into the party is a snack that matches the exact color of ANYTHING you are wearing. No matching snack, no entry. Choose your outfit (and your cravings) wisely.

children.name: add animation of floating hearts and the entered names by girls will float here

children.name: * [TERMS AND CONDITIONS]: Failure to attend at least one plan will result in a legally binding, lifelong grudge. I will never forget, and I will never let you live it down.
children.characters: * [TERMS AND CONDITIONS]: Failure to attend at least one plan will result in a legally binding, lifelong grudge. I will never forget, and I will never let you live it down.
